original: You can’t see the actual plants and herbs; they’re wrapped tightly in a thin gauze, which is tied shut at the top. You’re supposed to unravel the gauze, then apply the herbs to your body, and keep them in place with the gauze. It’s a bit primitive as far as medicine goes, and it’s too unwieldy to use more than once in a fight, but it’ll do in a pinch. In Combat: Restores 75 HP. Out of Combat: Restores 200 HP.
and instantly feel the alien enzymes go to work
Using supplements to heal yourself will only work once per fight. No body can handle the metabolic strain of downing multiple regenerative items in such quick succession.
You apply the poultice to your body
and instantly feel the alien enzymes go to work
{var0}+{var1}+" opens a healing poultice and uses it
